title: Flag-gated blueprint geometry deduplication (PR #159)
intent: Add a post-selection / pre-export geometry deduplication utility and wire it into all three blueprint cleanup paths behind BLUEPRINT_ENABLE_GEOMETRY_DEDUPE (default OFF). No default production behavior change: with the flag off the chains pass through untouched and export stays R12 + LINE-only. Adds DXF-stage fixture regression CI and xfail junction/topology specs documenting the known _reconstruct_chains enablement blocker. Does not enable the flag and does not change the dedupe algorithm.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Pass 1 (unified_dxf_cleaner.py): deduplicate_chains(), DeduplicationStats, internal Segment/SegmentKey, build_duplicate_debug_svg() + helpers. Pass 2: BLUEPRINT_ENABLE_GEOMETRY_DEDUPE flag in blueprint_limits.py (default False); flag-gated dedupe wired into _clean_blueprint_refined/_baseline/_restored_baseline in blueprint_clean.py; CleanResult.geometry_deduplication diagnostic field surfaced only under debug.geometry_deduplication in blueprint_orchestrator.py. Pass 3: DXF-stage fixture regression script + .github workflow. Tests: utility/flag/export-invariant tests, plus xfail junction/topology specs documenting the _reconstruct_chains degree>2 enablement blocker. The three *baseline.json files are a debt-baseline resync brought in via the main merge (not authored by the dedupe change).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The dedupe utility did not exist on the live default path; the wiring is the only thing that connects it, and it is gated off by default so the merge is behavior-neutral. The xfail specs are the only executable coverage of the >2-degree junction reconstruction defect (the existing suite feeds no junction). The CI script is the only repeatable artifact proving R12 + LINE-only export survives dedupe on real fixtures.

commands_run: direct-exec tests/test_geometry_deduplication.py -> 14 passed (pytest blocked locally by Python 3.14/numpy conftest)
direct-exec tests/test_geometry_deduplication_junctions.py -> 4 fail-as-expected (legitimate xfail; assert correct future topology)
CI 'Geometry Dedupe Fixture Regression' (Python 3.11) -> PASS: gibson_explorer/melody_maker/el_cuatro flag-off vs flag-on, R12 + LINE-only, no LWPOLYLINE

files.behavior_change: none by default - new utility, only invoked when BLUEPRINT_ENABLE_GEOMETRY_DEDUPE is enabled
